actions.message: Clear the rim, then descend the stairway.
Cross the burning fields — push east into the Pit.
The Hellgate is sealed — the key's to the WEST, on the Spire.
Climb the spire — take the elevator to the summit for the key.

stages.message: THE RIM IS CRAWLING — CLEAR IT.
THE KEY IS YOURS — NOW FIGHT BACK DOWN!
THE PIT — THE HELLGATE IS SEALED!
GET THE KEY FROM THE SPIRE — TO THE WEST!

keyLocks.speaker: Aspen
keyLocks.armText: That gate's sealed, slayer — the key's to the WEST. Top of the spire.
keyLocks.unlockText: Got it. The Hellgate's open — get to the sanctum.
